title: salvia grandiflora subsp. rotundifolia
intro: Salvia grandiflora subsp. rotundifolia, also known as Blue Sage, is a plant species in the mint family and a subspecies of Salvia grandiflora, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Salvia grandiflora subsp. rotundifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve cognitive function due to its antioxidant and adaptogenic properties. The herbal preparations of Blue Sage include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used for their medicinal and therapeutic properties.
